rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Re-Notice (After Appeal) Of Farhad Zaghis Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication As To Cecelia Kennedys Second Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 24, 2018, line 1. PLAINTIFF FARHAD ZAGHI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; Re-Notice (After Appeal) Of Farhad Zaghis Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication As To Cecelia Kennedys Second Amended Cross-Complaint Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL L THIBEAULT VS. PATRICIA A DARK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Bifurcate The Litigation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 24, 2018, line 2. PLAINTIFF PAUL THIBEAULT Plaintiff/Cross-Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Bifurcate The Litigation DENIED without prejudice. Per the Court's previous ruling of April 9, 2018, a request to bifurcate should be brought before the trial judge. Moreover, there is no good cause to sever portions of this case. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 24, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued upon the Court's own motion to June 13, 2018. Plaintiff failed to timely file an opposition and failed to provide adequate notice. Defendant may file a supplemental Reply addressing the merits of Defendant's Opposition by May 29, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 24, 2018, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Cross-Claimant fails to allege facts that the Third Amendment complies with the statute of frauds. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 24, 2018, line 5. DEFENDANT JESSICA SHAEFER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal of entire action on file. = (501/CFH)
